_comment: Copy this to railway.config.json (gitignored) and fill in a key. Provider is inferred from the key prefix: sk-or-... → OpenRouter, sk-ant-... → Anthropic. You can also set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / OPENROUTER_API_KEY / RAILWAY_MODEL / RAILWAY_PROVIDER in the environment or a .env file. Without a key, Railway runs with the built-in keyword router instead of AI generation.
